title: Trump claims Iran has assured U.S. there won't be tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.
summary_public: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.

IR.label: neutral
